text.title: Product Launch Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Product Launch.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS launches 'changelog bot' to indie-dev segment. Positioning: 'auto-generated changelogs from Git, $9/mo'. Channels: ProductHunt, HN Show, X thread, email blast (450 subs). Success metric: 25 paid signups in launch week. Result: 31 paid → continue.
